title: Frog AI is a lightweight open-source AI agent project
content: Frog AI is an open-source AI agent repository available at https://github.com/jinlongbao/frog-ai. The task result describes it as a smaller, lightweight, and practical project, suitable for people interested in experimenting with open-source agent tooling. This is a reusable reference for discovering AI agent repos, though the characterization is subjective and should be verified against the repository itself.
